data.name: Summer's Gone - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Summer's Gone is a high-quality, Interactive Visual Novel.

This game is about healing, hope, and love.

A young man plagued by depression and isolation.

The game explores numerous essential topics, including mental health, ambition & love.

Depression, shame, loneliness, and not fitting into a social template are some of the primary topics.

Much emphasis is placed on worldbuilding, interpersonal connection, and, especially, the characters.

Dating, love, and overcoming obstacles together are the premises of Summer's Gone. 

SG Season 1 features a wide variety of characters who accompany the main character through a new Chapter of his life.

The MC has isolated himself for a long time, but is now faced with something that falls outside his comfort zone, challenging him like nothing has before.

**College & Sports**

Once upon a time, he was the star player on the high school basketball team, and now the college tryouts are just a few weeks away.

But there's something in the back of your mind... Why couldn't you choose a college? Why did you have to go to the ZPR college?

Mysteries are about to unfold, and comfort zones are to be shattered.

Summer's Gone - Season 1 is interactive! Your choices matter!

*"Homesickness for a place I've never been."*

data.short_description: Summer's Gone is a high-quality, Interactive Visual Novel. This game is about healing, hope, and love. Overcome obstacles together, face demons of the past, and eventually... be happy.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or better
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 and above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4+
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 11 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
